ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Soup concentrate 81% (salt, dried vegetables in variable quantities max 25% (carrot, potato, parsnip, leek, onion), maltodekstrin, flavour enhancer (monosodium glutamate), sugar, palm fat, rice, spices: parsley leaf and pepper, citric acid, natural color: ribofllavin). Noodles 19% (Wheat semolina, water, salt).
